creator: arved@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

Unfortunately there has been another update, and the old version is no longer 
fetchable. Can you submit an updated patch? 

A couple of minor issues with your patch: 
- Don't change the Whom and Date lines in the header 
- Don't change the $FreeBSD$ tag 
- AFPL Ghostscript does not exist anymore 
-
